sections.paragraph:
Original: המן המון

Transliteration: hâmôn hâmôn

Phonetic: haw-mone'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) murmur, roar, crowd, abundance, tumult, sound
    1. sound, murmur, rush, roar
    2. tumult, confusion
    3. crowd, multitude
    4. great number, abundance
    5. abundance, wealth

Origin: from H1993

TWOT entry: 505a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
